nredisstack_sync.signature: SetIntersectionLength(RedisKey[] keys, long limit = 0, CommandFlags flags = CommandFlags.None)

params.name: keys
params.description: The keys of the sets.

params.name: limit
params.description: The number of elements to check (defaults to 0 and means unlimited).

params.name: flags
params.description: The flags to use for this operation.

returns.description: The cardinality (number of elements) of the set, or 0 if key does not exist.
